title: Smart Data Models - OpenStreetMap / OSMCraft
description: A place for crafts and manual trades from OpenStreetMap tagged with craft=*. This data model is a derivative work based on the OpenStreetMap Wiki, licensed under CC BY-SA 2.0 by OpenStreetMap contributors.

type.description: Property. NGSI Entity type. It has to be OSMCraft

osmId.description: Property. The original OpenStreetMap element integer identifier.

osmType.description: Property. The type of the original OSM element.

osmLastModified.description: Property. Timestamp of the last modification.

craftType.description: Property. The OSM craft tag classifying the service. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:craft'

openingHours.description: Property. Regular opening hours of the craft facility. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:opening_hours'

seeAlso.description: Property. List of URIs pointing to additional resources.
